title: rosa × odorata var. gigantea
intro: Rosa × odorata var. gigantea, commonly known as the fragrant giant rose, is a variety of rose plant that is native to Asia and is prized for its large, fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in reducing pain, inflammation, and improving overall health. The health benefits of Rosa × odorata var. gigantea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
